title: The Upside of Stress
subtitle: Why Stress Is Good for You, and How to Get Good at It
author: Kelly McGonigal
excerpt: The belief that stress is harmful is itself a health risk. Kelly McGonigal synthesizes research showing that changing your mind about stress changes your body's response to it. The stress response is not a malfunction — it's your body giving you energy, focus, and social connection to meet the challenge ahead.
